name: naturo
description: Windows desktop automation engine — see, click, type, and automate any app through UIA, MSAA, IA2, Java Access Bridge, Electron/CDP, and AI vision.
long_description: Naturo exposes Windows desktop automation as MCP tools so AI agents can inspect the accessibility tree, capture screenshots, click, type, manage windows and apps, and drive dialogs. This bundle launches the installed `naturo` CLI via `naturo mcp start`; run `pip install naturo` first.

tools.name: app_hide
tools.description: Hide (minimize) all windows of an application.

tools.name: app_inspect
tools.description: Probe an application to detect its UI framework and available interaction methods.

tools.name: app_switch
tools.description: Switch to (focus) the most recent window of an application.

tools.name: app_unhide
tools.description: Unhide (restore) all windows of an application.

tools.name: capture_screen
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the entire screen.

tools.name: capture_window
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a specific window.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click at coordinates or on a UI element.

tools.name: clipboard_clear
tools.description: Clear the system clipboard contents.

tools.name: clipboard_get
tools.description: Read the current clipboard text content.

tools.name: clipboard_info
tools.description: Get information about the current clipboard contents.

tools.name: clipboard_set
tools.description: Write text to the system clipboard.

tools.name: create_snapshot
tools.description: Create a snapshot of the current UI state (screenshot + element tree).

tools.name: dialog_accept
tools.description: Accept (confirm) the active dialog by clicking OK/Yes/Open/Save.

tools.name: dialog_click_button
tools.description: Click a specific button in the active dialog by name.

tools.name: dialog_detect
tools.description: Detect active dialog windows (message boxes, file pickers, etc.).

tools.name: dialog_dismiss
tools.description: Dismiss (cancel) the active dialog by clicking Cancel/No/Close.

tools.name: dialog_type
tools.description: Type text into a dialog's input field.

tools.name: drag
tools.description: Drag from one point to another.

tools.name: excel_info
tools.description: Get used range info for an Excel worksheet.

tools.name: excel_list_sheets
tools.description: List all sheets in an Excel workbook.

tools.name: excel_open
tools.description: Open an Excel workbook and return its info.

tools.name: excel_read
tools.description: Read a cell or range value from an Excel workbook.

tools.name: excel_run_macro
tools.description: Run a VBA macro in an Excel workbook.

tools.name: excel_write
tools.description: Write a value to a cell in an Excel workbook.

tools.name: expand_collapse_element
tools.description: Expand or collapse a combo box or tree item via ExpandCollapsePattern.

tools.name: find_element
tools.description: Find a UI element by selector.

tools.name: focus_window
tools.description: Bring a window to the foreground and give it focus.

tools.name: get_element_value
tools.description: Read the current value/text of a UI element.

tools.name: get_snapshot
tools.description: Retrieve a previously created snapshot.

tools.name: hotkey
tools.description: Press a keyboard shortcut (key combination).

tools.name: launch_app
tools.description: Launch an application by name.

tools.name: list_apps
tools.description: List running applications.

tools.name: list_monitors
tools.description: List all connected monitors/displays.

tools.name: list_snapshots
tools.description: List recent snapshots.

tools.name: list_windows
tools.description: List all visible windows on the desktop.

tools.name: menu_inspect
tools.description: Inspect the menu bar of an application.

tools.name: move_mouse
tools.description: Move the mouse cursor to a position.

tools.name: press_key
tools.description: Press a key or key combination.

tools.name: quit_app
tools.description: Quit an application.

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll the mouse wheel.

tools.name: see_ui_tree
tools.description: Inspect the UI accessibility tree of a window.

tools.name: select_element
tools.description: Select a list item, radio button, or tab via SelectionItemPattern.

tools.name: set_element_value
tools.description: Set the value/text of a UI element via UIA ValuePattern.

tools.name: taskbar_click
tools.description: Click a taskbar item to activate its window.

tools.name: taskbar_list
tools.description: List items on the Windows taskbar.

tools.name: toggle_element
tools.description: Toggle a checkbox or toggle button via UIA TogglePattern.

tools.name: tray_click
tools.description: Click a system tray icon.

tools.name: tray_list
tools.description: List system tray (notification area) icons.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type text using keyboard input.

tools.name: virtual_desktop_close
tools.description: Close a virtual desktop.

tools.name: virtual_desktop_create
tools.description: Create a new virtual desktop.

tools.name: virtual_desktop_list
tools.description: List all virtual desktops (Windows 10/11).

tools.name: virtual_desktop_move_window
tools.description: Move a window to a different virtual desktop.

tools.name: virtual_desktop_switch
tools.description: Switch to a virtual desktop by index.

tools.name: wait_for_element
tools.description: Wait for a UI element to appear.

tools.name: wait_for_window
tools.description: Wait for a window to appear.

tools.name: wait_until_gone
tools.description: Wait for a UI element to disappear.

tools.name: window_close
tools.description: Close a window (graceful or forced).

tools.name: window_maximize
tools.description: Maximize a window.

tools.name: window_minimize
tools.description: Minimize a window.

tools.name: window_move
tools.description: Move a window to a position (keeps current size).

tools.name: window_resize
tools.description: Resize a window (keeps current position).

tools.name: window_restore
tools.description: Restore a minimized or maximized window to normal state.

tools.name: window_set_bounds
tools.description: Set window position and size in one call.
